2192470.name: Torque Drift - Jhonnattan Castro GR86
2192470.description: Hailing from The Dominican Republic, this absolute beast of a car is none other than Jhonnattan Castro’s Toyota Rocket Bunny GR86! Much to unpack here for this exciting new release, it’s wide, it’s aggressive, it’s unmistakably Rocket Bunny. Castro fans will be ecstatic to hear that it will be running a new powerplant (YEP! A B58 ENGINE!) and will be reflected in-game as an engine with high response. Name a better car to relive the Formula Drift hype, go on!
2192470.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 土耳其语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
